w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Replace all inline page notification banners with a global toast notification system.
The system currently uses inline page notifications.
Success messages show as green alert boxes inside the page.
Error messages show as red alert boxes inside the page.
Pages use local React state like message,
Settings, Finance, Attendance, Departments, People, and other pages all show alerts directly inside the page.
This is not the style we want.
Use a proper global toast notification system instead of inline alert boxes.
Do not confuse toast notifications with the Dashboard recent activity panel.
Should remain only on the Dashboard.
It is not the toast system.
Should show after actions like create, update, delete, save, approve, reject, logout, password change, etc.
Should not take page layout space.
If the project already has another toast library installed, use the existing one only if it is properly maintained and fits the design.
Add the Toaster globally so all pages can use it.
The Toaster should be available across:
top-center or bottom-center on mobile if better
Create a reusable toast helper file.
This makes it easy to replace the toast library later.
Search the whole web app for inline alert logic.
Replace inline page alerts with toast calls.
Yellow warning boxes inside pages, unless it is a permanent page notice
Alert boxes that push page content down
Do not remove field-level validation messages.
Form validation errors should stay close to the field.
But action result messages should become toasts.
Update all pages and forms that currently show inline success/error messages.
Replace inline alerts with toast for:
Replace inline alerts with toast for:
Replace inline alerts with toast for:
Replace inline alerts with toast for:
Replace inline alerts with toast for:
Replace inline alerts with toast for:
Replace inline alerts with toast for:
Replace inline alerts with toast for:
Use for actions that need caution.
Example: "This member already belongs to this department."
Show loading toast when action starts.
Replace it with success or error after action ends.
Do not show toast repeatedly for background polling or automatic refresh.
Do not show toast every time data
Only show toast when the user performs an action.
User clicks Record Welfare Payment -> toast
Create a helper to extract error messages.
Use this helper in all catch blocks.
Show toast with the backend message if safe.
Do not expose sensitive technical details to users.
Log technical error only in console during development.
Unable to complete request. Please try again.
The toast must look premium and modern, not default browser alert style.
Remove old inline message states where no longer needed.
error only if it was only used for page alert
only if it was only used for page alert
A global toast provider is installed and configured.
Toasts work across the whole app.
Inline green success alert boxes are removed.
Inline red error alert boxes are removed where they were only action messages.
Settings uses toast after profile update.
Settings uses toast after password change.
Welfare uses toast after recording payment.
Attendance uses toast after recording attendance.
Logout uses toast or clean redirect behavior.
Dashboard Recent Activity remains separate from toast notifications.
No toast appears repeatedly because of background polling.
Toast design matches the dark/lime system theme.
